_readme: Only change passes from false to true. Do not delete entries or modify descriptions without an explicit product decision.

features.acceptance: Chat, Memory, and Dashboard routes work without regressing ChatPage.
Dashboard opens in a full-page iframe and handles missing dependencies gracefully.
MEMORY.md and USER.md can be read and saved with character-limit enforcement.
Context, cost, and tool-call status are visible in the top bar.
Users can trigger compression with an optional focus string.
Configured models can be searched and selected by provider.
